title: Senior Doctor - Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd!
